---
title: "In-Class Exercise 6"
author: "CHUA Wee Tian"
date: "May 23, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

[Exercise 6](https://wtchuamitb.shinyapps.io/Shiny_Demo/)

[![](image/Picture1.png){width="430"}](https://wtchuamitb.shinyapps.io/Shiny_Demo/)
